title: Complexity MoE v4: Token-Routed I64 + PID + CUDA Scatter + Int6 (26.5M params)
author: Complexity-ML

data.description: 4-expert SwiGLU mixture-of-experts with deterministic hybrid routing (modulo base plus learned override) and CUDA scatter/gather dispatch.
Learnable equilibrium mu traverses all layers with clamping, acting like a PID-style controller over hidden state dynamics.
Replaces the baseline relu² MLP activation with SwiGLU experts.

novel_contributions: Token-routed mixture-of-experts with deterministic modulo routing and learned override
PID-style dynamics with a learnable mu state traversing all layers
CUDA scatter/gather expert dispatch for reduced wasted compute
Int6 quantization combined with zstd-22 compression
Stochastic weight averaging of fp32 checkpoints
Cosine warm restart learning rate schedule
Sliding-window evaluation with stride 64 and context length 2048
